a confident and composed male portrait
a girl looking back at the camera

items.zh: 舞台灯光下的偶像瞬间

items.zh: 带有故事感的双人画面

items.zh: 人群中被突出表现的主体
items.en: a subject standing out from the crowd
with a calm and restrained expression
slightly lowering the head and looking aside
hair gently blown by the wind
one hand naturally near the cheek
a candid moment as if casually captured

items.en: rainy neon street at night with reflective pavement

items.zh: 黄昏天台，微风吹动发丝
items.en: sunset rooftop with a gentle breeze moving the hair

items.zh: 老旧小巷里的日常生活感
items.en: everyday life feeling in an old alley

items.zh: 咖啡馆靠窗位置的自然光
items.en: natural window light in a cafe

items.zh: 地铁站台上等待的瞬间
items.en: a waiting moment on a subway platform
soft morning light in a bedroom

items.zh: 带有回忆感的怀旧氛围
真实人像，主体清晰，背景自然虚化
items.en: realistic portrait, clear subject, natural background bokeh

items.zh: 电影剧照感，细腻光影，低调叙事
items.en: cinematic still, delicate lighting, subtle storytelling

items.zh: 手机随拍感，轻微不完美，真实生活气息
items.en: mobile snapshot feel, slight imperfections, authentic everyday atmosphere

items.zh: 时尚杂志大片，高级造型，干净构图

items.zh: 动漫主视觉，角色突出，画面完成度高

items.zh: 商业视觉质感，主体突出，细节干净
items.en: commercial visual quality, prominent subject, clean details

items.zh: 写实日系写真，色彩柔和自然
items.en: realistic Japanese portrait photography with soft natural colors

items.zh: 港风胶片夜景，强烈氛围感
items.en: Hong Kong film night scene with strong atmosphere

items.zh: 赛博朋克人像，霓虹色彩，高反差
items.en: cyberpunk portrait, neon colors, high contrast

items.zh: 低饱和杂志感，干净高级
items.en: low-saturation editorial style, clean and refined

items.zh: 柔和水彩插画，边缘细腻
items.en: soft watercolor illustration with delicate edges

items.zh: 厚涂角色插画，层次丰富
items.en: thick-painted character illustration with rich layers

items.zh: 前景遮挡形成空间层次
主体略偏离中心，画面更自然
items.en: subject slightly off-center for a more natural frame

items.zh: 面部特写，突出眼神和情绪
items.en: close-up face shot emphasizing eyes and emotion

items.zh: 全身构图并保留环境信息
柔和窗光照亮自然肤色
items.en: soft window light illuminating natural skin tone
neon rim light outlining the silhouette

items.zh: 黄金时刻逆光，发丝透亮
items.en: golden hour backlight with glowing hair

items.zh: 低调暗部层次，保留细节
电影级光比，明暗层次清晰
items.en: cinematic lighting ratio with clear light and shadow layers

items.zh: 阴天柔光，肤色均匀自然
items.en: soft overcast light, even and natural skin tone

items.zh: 清晰主体，自然皮肤纹理，不过度磨皮
items.en: clear subject, natural skin texture, not overly retouched

items.zh: 高细节但避免塑料质感
items.en: highly detailed while avoiding plastic texture

items.zh: 眼神清晰，五官自然协调
items.en: sharp eyes, natural and harmonious facial features

items.zh: 曝光准确，色彩自然，层次稳定
items.en: accurate exposure, natural colors, stable tonal layers

items.zh: 完成度高，商业级画面质感
items.en: highly finished image with commercial-grade quality

items.zh: 真实照片质感，细节可信
items.en: real photo texture with believable details

items.zh: 避免AI塑料感、过度磨皮、假皮肤
items.en: avoid AI plastic look, over-smoothed skin, fake skin texture

items.zh: 避免畸形手指、多余肢体、错误人体结构
items.en: avoid deformed fingers, extra limbs, wrong anatomy

items.zh: 避免低清晰度、模糊、噪点过多、压缩痕迹
items.en: avoid low resolution, blur, excessive noise, compression artifacts

items.zh: 避免过锐、过曝、过饱和、HDR过度
items.en: avoid oversharpening, overexposure, oversaturation, excessive HDR

items.zh: 避免脸部崩坏、眼神不自然、五官错位
items.en: avoid broken face, unnatural eyes, misplaced facial features

description: 优化版绘图提示词库：强化真实摄影、老式数码相机、街拍、妆发、动作姿态、场景细节、镜头语言、负面词与模板。

templates.name: 自然人像描述模板
templates.description: 适合写实人像、街拍、生活感照片和可编辑中文长 prompt。
templates.zh: 这是一张{style}风格的人像画面，画面主体是{subject}。{subject}身穿{clothing}，搭配{accessories}，妆发细节为{makeup}。场景位于{scene}，周围环境带有{atmosphere}。镜头采用{composition}，光线来自{lighting}。画面像由{camera}拍摄，整体具有{quality}，并保留真实自然的细节。
templates.en: A {style} portrait image featuring {subject}. The subject wears {clothing}, paired with {accessories}, with makeup and hair details of {makeup}. The scene is set in {scene}, carrying {atmosphere}. The frame uses {composition}, lit by {lighting}. It feels captured with {camera}, with overall {quality} and natural believable details.
templates.negative: low quality, blurry, watermark, over-smoothed skin, plastic skin, AI-generated look

templates.name: 老式数码相机扶梯抓拍
templates.zh: 老式数码相机快照，高处俯拍，一位二十出头女性乘坐下行扶梯，抬头看向镜头，淡淡微笑，东亚网红妆，浅色底妆，浓郁腮红，亮泽唇彩，眼下美人痣，蓬松短波波头，白色薄纱开衫，V领上衣，樱桃图案，深红色皮质手提包，纤细项链，荷兰角倾斜构图，业余智能手机摄影，亮蓝色扶梯扶手，黄色警示线，金属楼梯，离去的行人背景，原始真实感，数字噪点，可见颗粒，平淡人工照明，橙色日期戳，怀旧都市快照
templates.en: old digital camera snapshot, high-angle overhead shot, a woman in her early twenties riding a descending escalator, looking up at the camera, slight smile, East Asian influencer makeup, pale foundation, heavy blush, glossy lips, beauty mark under the eye, messy bob cut, white sheer cardigan, V-neck top with small cherry print, dark red leather handbag, delicate necklace, Dutch angle, amateur smartphone photo, bright blue escalator handrail, yellow warning line, metal stairs, pedestrians leaving in the background, raw realism, digital noise, visible grain, flat artificial lighting, orange date stamp, nostalgic urban snapshot
templates.description: 适合 CCD、公共扶梯、地铁通道、老式数码相机快照。
templates.negative: low quality, blurry, watermark, over-smoothed skin, AI-generated look

templates.name: 夜晚街头直闪人像
templates.zh: 夜晚街头，直闪摄影，年轻女性，街拍模特，Y2K穿搭，粉色迷你包，金属链条装饰，发丝被风吹起，看向镜头，背景车流模糊，店铺招牌，潮湿路面，轻微运动模糊，数字噪点，真实皮肤纹理，社交媒体随手拍
templates.en: night street, direct flash photography, young woman, street style model, Y2K outfit, pink mini bag, metal chain detail, windblown hair, looking at camera, blurred traffic in the background, shop signs, wet pavement, slight motion blur, digital noise, real skin texture, social media casual photo
templates.description: 适合夜晚街头、直闪、人像街拍和社交媒体随手拍。
templates.negative: low quality, blurry, watermark, over-smoothed skin, AI-generated look

templates.name: 暗黑可爱小巷抓拍
templates.zh: 狭窄后街，暗黑系，地雷系，黑色洛丽塔裙，蕾丝边，蝴蝶结细节，双马尾，发夹装饰，颈圈，毛绒玩偶，蹲姿，看向镜头，强烈直闪，混凝土墙面，金属卷帘门，原始真实感，JPEG压缩痕迹，轻微跑焦
templates.en: narrow backstreet, dark style, jirai kei, black lolita dress, lace trim, ribbon detail, twin tails, hair clips, choker, plush toy, squatting pose, looking at camera, harsh direct flash, concrete wall, metal shutter, raw realism, JPEG compression artifacts, slightly missed focus
templates.description: 适合暗黑可爱、后街抓拍、洛丽塔和强直闪风格。
templates.negative: low quality, blurry, watermark, over-smoothed skin, AI-generated look

updateNotes: 补充妆发分类，增强真人/网红/街拍类生成控制。
补充老式数码相机、直闪、日期戳、数字噪点等真实快照词。
补充镜头角度、荷兰角、高处俯拍、随手拍裁切等构图词。
补充交通空间、扶梯、地铁、城市细节，适配参考提示词。
补充AI痕迹负面词，区分真实摄影与插画/动漫/CG风格。
新增模板 templates，方便一键套用成熟组合。
